verses.text: Na deih lianpen uh ki-itna na hisak un. Kha Siangtho' hong piak siamna a tuamtuamte sung panin thuhilh siamna neihding na hanciam phapen un

Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang a paute pen mite' tungah thugen hiloin Pasian' tungah thugen ahi hi. Amaute' pau kuamah in theilo a, Kha Siangtho' vangliatna tawh Pasian' thusimte a gengen ahi uh hi
Ahi zongin Pasian' thu a hilhte pen mite tungah thugen hi a, mite tungah huhna, hanthotna, leh hehnepna a pia ahi hi
Pau lamdang a paute pen amau mahmah a phattuamna dingin a pau hi a, Pasian' thu a hilhte ahih leh pawlpi' phattuamna dingin nasem ahi hi

Note khempeuh pau lamdang na pautheih ding uh kong deihsak hangin Pasian' thu hilh ding siamna na neihding uh ka hong deihsakzaw hi. Pawlpi in phattuamna a ngahtheihna dingin note lakah a khiatna a genthei pah ding om ahih kei buang leh, pau lamdang a paute sangin Pasian' thu a hilhte a lianzaw ahi hi

Sanggamte aw, note kiangah hong pai-in pau lamdang tawh thu hong gen leng, bangin kimang ding ahi hiam? Note-a'-in Pasian' thu theihna, pilna leh siamna a hong pian'sak kei leh a kiman'na themkhat zong om hetlo hi
Nuntakna a neilo tamngai leh harp lasaknate nangawn, a aw a kitelin ging sensen kei leh bang la kisa ahi hiam, ci-in kua in theithei ding ahi hiam
Galdona ding peengkul a tumpa in a aw a kitelin tum kei leh galdo dingin kua kithawi theiding ahi hiam
Tua mah bangin na thugenna uh kammal kitel sinsen kei leh kua in note' thugen theithei ding ahi hiam? Na thugen uh huihlakah a maimang suak lel ding hi
Leitungah pau nam tampi om a, ahi zongin khiatna a neilo khat beek omlo hi
Ahi zongin a kipau paunam thei kei leng, kei pen a paupa-a' dingin mi namdangpi ka hi ding a, a paupa zong kei-a' dingin mi namdangpi khat hi ding hi
Note in zong Kha Siangtho' hong piak siamnate deih belin nei na hih manun pawlpi-a' dingin phattuamna taktak a piangsak ding siamnate mah nget belin na nei ta un
Tua ahih manin pau lamdang a paute in, amau paute a khiatna a gen theihna ding uh siamna a neihna dingun thu ngen ta uh hen
Bang hang hiam cih leh pau lamdang tawh thu ka nget ciangin lungsim takpi tawh thungen ka hih tei hangin bang ngen ka hi hiam cih ka ngaihsun thei kei hi

Tua ahih leh bangci gamtat ding ka hi hiam? Ka lungsim tawh thu ka ngen ding a, ka ngette ka theihna ding tawh zong ka ngen ding hi. Ka lungsim tawh la ka sa ding a, ka sakte ka theihna ding tawh zong ka sa ding hi

Na lungsim bek tawh Pasian tungah lungdamna na koh ciangin kikhopna sungah a om midangte in bangci-in nang' thungetna, “Amen,” hong cihpih thei ding ahi hiam? Nangma thungette a theihtheihna ding uh bangmah omlo hi
Pasian tungah lungdam ko-in na thungetna a hoih mahmah hangin midangte in bangmah phattuamna ngah hetlo hi
Note khempeuh sangin pau lamdang pau theizaw ka hih manin Pasian tungah ka lungdam hi
Ahi ta zongin pawlpite' biak kikhopna sungah pau lamdang kam tul sawm bang ka pau sangin midangte' phattuamna dingin a theihding uh kammal nga bek ka pauzaw ding hi
Sanggamte aw, na thu ngaihsutnate uhah naupang bang kei un. Gitlohna lamah naupang bang un la, ahi zongin thu ngaihsutna-ah a khangham hi ta un

Lai Siangtho sungah, “A lamdang kampau tawh amaute hopihin, minam dangte' pau tawh thu ka gen ding a, tua bang nangawnin hih mite in keima thugen hong ngailo ding uh hi, ci-in Topa in a gen hi,” ci-in na kigelh hi

Tua ahih manin pau lamdang pen thu um mite-a' ding hiloin, thu umlo mite in a uptheihna ding uh lim ahi hi. Tua mah bangin Pasian' thuhilhna pen thu um mite-a' ding hi a, thu umlo mite-a' ding hilo hi

Tua ahih manin pawlpi mi khempeuh na kikhopna uhah na vekpi-un pau lamdangin pau-in, mi mawkmawkte ahih kei leh thu umlo mite in hong mu zenzen leh, note pen mihai hontang hi, hong ci ding hilo ahi uh hiam
Ahi zongin na vekpi-un hoihtakin Pasian' thu na gen laitakun mi mawkmawkte ahih kei leh thu umlote hong pai leh, a zak uh thute hangin a mawhna uh kiphawkin a hoihlohna uh kithei ding uh hi
A lungsim sung uhah a ipcipte uh kipholak ding a, khukdin'in Pasian bia-in, “Hih mite lakah Pasian om taktak hi,” ci ding uh hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Na Khempeuh A Kilawm A Kituakin Hih Ding

verses.text: Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, ka hong gennop thu a tomin: Pasian bia dingin note na kikhop uh ciangin khat in la sak ding nei, khat in Pasian' thu a gen ding nei, khat in pau lamdang tawh thugen ding nei, khat in tua a kigente a khiatna gentheihna ding nei cih bangin na om ding uh hi. Hih a tuamtuamte khempeuh, pawlpi' phattuamna ding ahih ding kisam hi
Pau lamdang tawh thugen nuam a om leh zong, nih bang, ahih kei leh a tam penin thum bang in gen bek ding a, tua bangin a gen uh ciangin zong khat a man khit ciangin khat in a banbanin gen ding uh hi
Ahi zongin a khiatna a genthei ding a om kei leh zong, kikhopna sungah pau lamdangin a pau nuampa gamdai takin om ding a, amah leh Pasian tawh kikal bekah kigen ding uh hi
Pasian thu gen ding a neite sung panin nih leh thum bang bek in a banbanin gen ding uh a, adangte in limtakin na telngaih ding uh hi
A kikhawm mite sung panin mi khatpeuh in Pasian thu gen ding hong neih leh tua a thugen laipa khawl phot ding hi
Na vekpi-un a thu thei-in thahatna na ngahtheihna dingun no thugen ding a neite khempeuh in khat khatin thu na ban gen ding uh hi

Pasian in eite ahi zelzul dingin a hong sam hilo a, hoihtak nuamtakin a om dingin a hong sam ahih manin Pasian' thu gen ding lawpna lungsim pen a gen dingpa a ki-ukzawh ding a kisam ahi hi. Pasian' pawlpi mite khempeuh lakah a kizang ngeina ahih mah bangin
mihon biak kikhopna sungah numeite pauloin om uh hen. Numeite a kiniamkhiatna ding thu Jew Thukham in a gen mah bangin amaute in mihon lakah thu a gen ding uh kiphallo hi
Amaute in a theihnop uh thu a om leh, inn panin a pasalte uh dong ta uh hen. Bang hang hiam cih leh mihon lakah numeite kam a pau ding zumhuai hi
Note kiang bek panin Pasian' thu hong kipan a, note tung bekah a hong tung sa zenzen na hi uh hiam
Mi khatpeuh in Kha Siangtho hong piak siamna a nei, Pasian thugen ka hi hi, ci-in a kingaihsut leh hih lai ka hong gelhte pen Topa' thupiakna tawh a gelh ka hihlamtak a phawkding kisam hi
Hih ka thugente a don kei leh amah zong don kei pah un
Tua ahih ciangin sanggamte aw, Pasian' thu hilh ding ngaihsut lian penin na nei un la, ahi zongin pau lamdang a paute na kho dah hoh un
Na khempeuh a kilawm a kituakin na hih un.
